Page 3

Unique paragraph for page 3. This page documents a distinct concept in the Next.js framework that is not shared with the other pages in this corpus. It includes enough body text to clear the Defuddle scoring threshold so that the article body survives extraction and can be deduplicated against its peers.

Additional context for page 3: every paragraph here is unique, with the integer 3 appearing throughout to guarantee that the body content does not collide with any other page in the test corpus. The boilerplate navigation above, however, is identical across all five pages and should be deduplicated by the crawl pipeline.

A third paragraph for page 3 so that the corpus is unambiguously substantive. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, page 3 style, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua page 3.
